name: IRS metrics
description: Reports utilising the data collected by IRS on DPS to provide insights for various metrics.

dataset.name: DW actions / day
dataset.query: SELECT CAST(date_trunc('day', correction_requested_at) AS DATE) AS day, format_datetime(MIN(correction_requested_at), 'dd/MM/yyyy') AS min_date, format_datetime(MAX(correction_requested_at), 'dd/MM/yyyy') AS max_date, COALESCE(correction_requested_by, 'All data wardens') AS dw_username, count(CASE WHEN user_action = 'REQUEST_CORRECTION' THEN id END) AS sent_back, count(CASE WHEN user_action = 'HOLD' THEN id END) AS held, count(CASE WHEN user_action = 'RECALL' THEN id END) AS recalled, count(CASE WHEN user_action = 'CLOSE' THEN id END) AS closed, count(CASE WHEN user_action = 'MARK_DUPLICATE' THEN id END) AS marked_as_duplicate, count(CASE WHEN user_action = 'MARK_NOT_REPORTABLE' THEN id END) AS marked_as_np, count(id) AS total_actions FROM prisons.incidentreporting_correction_request cr WHERE user_type = 'DATA_WARDEN' GROUP BY 1, ROLLUP(correction_requested_by)

dataset.name: DW actions / month
dataset.query: SELECT CAST(date_trunc('month', correction_requested_at) AS DATE) AS month, format_datetime(MIN(correction_requested_at), 'dd/MM/yyyy') AS min_date, format_datetime(MAX(correction_requested_at), 'dd/MM/yyyy') AS max_date, COALESCE(correction_requested_by, 'All data wardens') AS dw_username, count(CASE WHEN user_action = 'REQUEST_CORRECTION' THEN id END) AS sent_back, count(CASE WHEN user_action = 'HOLD' THEN id END) AS held, count(CASE WHEN user_action = 'RECALL' THEN id END) AS recalled, count(CASE WHEN user_action = 'CLOSE' THEN id END) AS closed, count(CASE WHEN user_action = 'MARK_DUPLICATE' THEN id END) AS marked_as_duplicate, count(CASE WHEN user_action = 'MARK_NOT_REPORTABLE' THEN id END) AS marked_as_np, count(id) AS total_actions FROM prisons.incidentreporting_correction_request WHERE user_type = 'DATA_WARDEN' GROUP BY 1, ROLLUP(correction_requested_by)

dataset.name: % of reports returned / month
dataset.query: SELECT month, min_date, max_date, location, incident_type, all_reports, returned, dw_not_seen, closed, CASE WHEN (all_reports-dw_not_seen) = 0 THEN 0.0 ELSE ROUND((CAST(returned AS decimal(18,2))/(all_reports-dw_not_seen))*100, 1) END AS dw_seen_percentage_returned FROM (SELECT CAST(date_trunc('month', created_at) AS DATE) AS month, format_datetime(MIN(created_at), 'dd/MM/yyyy') AS min_date, format_datetime(MAX(created_at), 'dd/MM/yyyy') AS max_date, COALESCE(r.location, 'All locations') AS location, COALESCE(ct.description, 'All incident types') AS incident_type, count(r.id) AS all_reports, count(CASE WHEN cr.requested_corection = '1' THEN r.id END) AS returned, count(CASE WHEN r.status IN ('DRAFT', 'AWAITING_REVIEW') THEN r.id END) AS dw_not_seen, count(CASE WHEN r.status IN ('CLOSED', 'DUPLICATE', 'NOT_REPORTABLE') THEN r.id END) AS closed FROM prisons.incidentreporting_report AS r LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT report_id, '1' AS requested_corection FROM prisons.incidentreporting_correction_request WHERE user_action = 'REQUEST_CORRECTION') AS cr ON r.id = cr.report_id LEFT JOIN (SELECT code, description FROM prisons.incidentreporting_constant_type) AS ct ON r.type = ct.code WHERE r.source = 'DPS' AND r.location NOT IN ('NORTH', 'SOUTH') GROUP BY 1, ROLLUP(r.location), ROLLUP(ct.description))

dataset.name: % of reviews returned / month
dataset.query: SELECT *, ROUND((CAST(sent_back AS decimal(18,2))/reports_reviewed)*100, 1) AS per_returned FROM (SELECT CAST(date_trunc('month', correction_requested_at) AS DATE) AS month, format_datetime(MIN(correction_requested_at), 'dd/MM/yyyy') AS min_date, format_datetime(MAX(correction_requested_at), 'dd/MM/yyyy') AS max_date, COALESCE(location, 'All locations') AS location, COALESCE(incident_type, 'All incident types') AS incident_type, COUNT(report_id) AS reports_reviewed, COUNT(CASE WHEN user_action = 'REQUEST_CORRECTION' THEN report_id END) AS sent_back, COUNT(CASE WHEN user_action <> 'REQUEST_CORRECTION' THEN report_id END) AS completed FROM (SELECT report_id, correction_requested_at, location, incident_type, sequence, user_action, prev_dw_action FROM (SELECT cr.report_id, cr.sequence, cr.user_action, cr.correction_requested_at, ct.description AS incident_type, r.location, first_value(sequence) OVER (PARTITION BY report_id ORDER BY sequence) AS first_dw_sequence, lag(user_action) OVER (PARTITION BY report_id ORDER BY sequence) AS prev_dw_action FROM prisons.incidentreporting_correction_request AS cr LEFT JOIN (SELECT id, source, type, location FROM prisons.incidentreporting_report) AS r ON cr.report_id = r.id LEFT JOIN (SELECT code, description FROM prisons.incidentreporting_constant_type) AS ct ON r.type = ct.code WHERE r.source = 'DPS' AND user_type = 'DATA_WARDEN' AND r.location NOT IN ('NORTH', 'SOUTH')) WHERE (sequence = first_dw_sequence AND user_action <> 'HOLD') OR (sequence = first_dw_sequence + 1 AND prev_dw_action = 'HOLD')) GROUP BY 1, ROLLUP(location), ROLLUP(incident_type))

dataset.name: Report actions / week
dataset.query: SELECT CAST(date_trunc('week', cr.correction_requested_at) AS DATE) AS week, format_datetime(MIN(cr.correction_requested_at), 'dd/MM/yyyy') AS min_date, format_datetime(MAX(cr.correction_requested_at), 'dd/MM/yyyy') AS max_date, COALESCE(r.location, 'All locations') AS location, COALESCE(ct.description, 'All incident types') AS incident_type, count(DISTINCT(cr.report_id)) AS num_reports, count(cr.id) AS total_actions, ROUND(CAST(count(cr.id) AS decimal(18,2))/CAST(count(DISTINCT(cr.report_id)) AS decimal(18,2)),1) AS avg_actions_per_report, count(CASE WHEN user_action = 'REQUEST_REVIEW' AND last_status = 'DRAFT' THEN cr.id END) AS num_first_submissions, count(CASE WHEN user_action = 'REQUEST_DUPLICATE' AND last_status = 'DRAFT' THEN cr.id END) AS num_first_req_dup, count(CASE WHEN user_action = 'REQUEST_NOT_REPORTABLE' AND last_status = 'DRAFT' THEN cr.id END) AS num_first_req_nr, count(CASE WHEN user_action = 'REQUEST_CORRECTION' AND last_status = 'DRAFT' THEN cr.id END) AS num_sent_back, count(CASE WHEN user_action = 'HOLD' THEN cr.id END) AS num_held, count(CASE WHEN user_action = 'REQUEST_REVIEW' AND last_status <> 'DRAFT' THEN cr.id END) AS num_resubmissions, count(CASE WHEN user_action = 'REQUEST_DUPLICATE' AND last_status <> 'DRAFT' THEN cr.id END) AS num_add_req_dup, count(CASE WHEN user_action = 'REQUEST_NOT_REPORTABLE' AND last_status <> 'DRAFT' THEN cr.id END) AS num_add_req_nr, count(CASE WHEN user_action = 'REQUEST_CORRECTION' AND last_status <> 'DRAFT' THEN cr.id END) AS num_sent_back_again, count(CASE WHEN user_action = 'RECALL' AND user_type = 'REPORTING_OFFICER' AND last_status NOT IN ('CLOSED', 'DUPLICATE', 'NOT_REPORTABLE') THEN cr.id END) AS num_recalled_ro, count(CASE WHEN user_action = 'RECALL' AND user_type = 'DATA_WARDEN' AND last_status NOT IN ('CLOSED', 'DUPLICATE', 'NOT_REPORTABLE')  THEN cr.id END) AS num_recalled_dw, count(CASE WHEN user_action = 'CLOSE' THEN cr.id END) AS num_closed, count(CASE WHEN user_action = 'MARK_DUPLICATE' THEN cr.id END) AS num_mark_dup, count(CASE WHEN user_action = 'MARK_NOT_REPORTABLE' THEN cr.id END) AS num_mark_nr, count(CASE WHEN user_action = 'RECALL' AND user_type = 'REPORTING_OFFICER' AND last_status IN ('CLOSED', 'DUPLICATE', 'NOT_REPORTABLE') THEN cr.id END) AS num_reopened_ro, count(CASE WHEN user_action = 'RECALL' AND user_type = 'DATA_WARDEN' AND last_status IN ('CLOSED', 'DUPLICATE', 'NOT_REPORTABLE')  THEN cr.id END) AS num_reopened_dw FROM prisons.incidentreporting_correction_request AS cr LEFT JOIN (SELECT location, id, type, source FROM prisons.incidentreporting_report) AS r ON cr.report_id = r.id LEFT JOIN (SELECT report_id, status AS new_status, changed_by, lag(status) OVER (PARTITION BY report_id ORDER BY changed_at) AS last_status, count(status) OVER (PARTITION BY report_id ORDER BY changed_at) - 2 AS sh_sequence FROM prisons.incidentreporting_status_history) AS sh ON cr.report_id = sh.report_id AND cr.sequence = sh.sh_sequence AND cr.correction_requested_by = sh.changed_by LEFT JOIN (SELECT code, description FROM prisons.incidentreporting_constant_type) AS ct ON r.type = ct.code WHERE r.source = 'DPS' GROUP BY 1, ROLLUP(r.location), ROLLUP(ct.description)

dataset.name: Report actions / month
dataset.query: SELECT CAST(date_trunc('month', cr.correction_requested_at) AS DATE) AS month, format_datetime(MIN(cr.correction_requested_at), 'dd/MM/yyyy') AS min_date, format_datetime(MAX(cr.correction_requested_at), 'dd/MM/yyyy') AS max_date, COALESCE(r.location, 'All locations') AS location, COALESCE(ct.description, 'All incident types') AS incident_type, count(DISTINCT(cr.report_id)) AS num_reports, count(cr.id) AS total_actions, ROUND(CAST(count(cr.id) AS decimal(18,2))/CAST(count(DISTINCT(cr.report_id)) AS decimal(18,2)),1) AS avg_actions_per_report, count(CASE WHEN user_action = 'REQUEST_REVIEW' AND last_status = 'DRAFT' THEN cr.id END) AS num_first_submissions, count(CASE WHEN user_action = 'REQUEST_DUPLICATE' AND last_status = 'DRAFT' THEN cr.id END) AS num_first_req_dup, count(CASE WHEN user_action = 'REQUEST_NOT_REPORTABLE' AND last_status = 'DRAFT' THEN cr.id END) AS num_first_req_nr, count(CASE WHEN user_action = 'REQUEST_CORRECTION' AND last_status = 'DRAFT' THEN cr.id END) AS num_sent_back, count(CASE WHEN user_action = 'HOLD' THEN cr.id END) AS num_held, count(CASE WHEN user_action = 'REQUEST_REVIEW' AND last_status <> 'DRAFT' THEN cr.id END) AS num_resubmissions, count(CASE WHEN user_action = 'REQUEST_DUPLICATE' AND last_status <> 'DRAFT' THEN cr.id END) AS num_add_req_dup, count(CASE WHEN user_action = 'REQUEST_NOT_REPORTABLE' AND last_status <> 'DRAFT' THEN cr.id END) AS num_add_req_nr, count(CASE WHEN user_action = 'REQUEST_CORRECTION' AND last_status <> 'DRAFT' THEN cr.id END) AS num_sent_back_again, count(CASE WHEN user_action = 'RECALL' AND user_type = 'REPORTING_OFFICER' AND last_status NOT IN ('CLOSED', 'DUPLICATE', 'NOT_REPORTABLE') THEN cr.id END) AS num_recalled_ro, count(CASE WHEN user_action = 'RECALL' AND user_type = 'DATA_WARDEN' AND last_status NOT IN ('CLOSED', 'DUPLICATE', 'NOT_REPORTABLE')  THEN cr.id END) AS num_recalled_dw, count(CASE WHEN user_action = 'CLOSE' THEN cr.id END) AS num_closed, count(CASE WHEN user_action = 'MARK_DUPLICATE' THEN cr.id END) AS num_mark_dup, count(CASE WHEN user_action = 'MARK_NOT_REPORTABLE' THEN cr.id END) AS num_mark_nr, count(CASE WHEN user_action = 'RECALL' AND user_type = 'REPORTING_OFFICER' AND last_status IN ('CLOSED', 'DUPLICATE', 'NOT_REPORTABLE') THEN cr.id END) AS num_reopened_ro, count(CASE WHEN user_action = 'RECALL' AND user_type = 'DATA_WARDEN' AND last_status IN ('CLOSED', 'DUPLICATE', 'NOT_REPORTABLE')  THEN cr.id END) AS num_reopened_dw FROM prisons.incidentreporting_correction_request AS cr LEFT JOIN (SELECT location, id, type, source FROM prisons.incidentreporting_report) AS r ON cr.report_id = r.id LEFT JOIN (SELECT report_id, status AS new_status, changed_by, lag(status) OVER (PARTITION BY report_id ORDER BY changed_at) AS last_status, count(status) OVER (PARTITION BY report_id ORDER BY changed_at) - 2 AS sh_sequence FROM prisons.incidentreporting_status_history) AS sh ON cr.report_id = sh.report_id AND cr.sequence = sh.sh_sequence AND cr.correction_requested_by = sh.changed_by LEFT JOIN (SELECT code, description FROM prisons.incidentreporting_constant_type) AS ct ON r.type = ct.code WHERE r.source = 'DPS' GROUP BY 1, ROLLUP(r.location), ROLLUP(ct.description)

dataset.name: RO submission statistics / month
dataset.query: SELECT CAST(date_trunc('month', reported_at) AS DATE) AS month, format_datetime(MIN(reported_at), 'dd/MM/yyyy') AS min_date, format_datetime(MAX(reported_at), 'dd/MM/yyyy') AS max_date, COALESCE(location, 'All locations') AS location, count(id) AS total_reports, ROUND(AVG(time_diff_mins),1) AS avg_mins, ROUND(CAST(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY time_diff_mins) AS decimal(18,2)),1) AS median_mins, ROUND(MAX(time_diff_hrs),1) AS longest_submitted_hrs, count(CASE WHEN (time_diff_hrs > 72) THEN id END) AS number_took_too_long, ROUND((CAST(count(CASE WHEN (time_diff_hrs > 72) THEN id END) AS decimal(18,2))/CAST(count(id) AS decimal(18,2)))*100, 1) AS perc_too_long, ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN time_diff_mins < 4320 THEN time_diff_mins END),1) AS avg_mins_wo_too_long, count(CASE WHEN correction_requested_at IS NULL THEN id END) AS not_yet_actioned, count(CASE WHEN status = 'DRAFT' THEN id END) AS currently_in_draft, count(CASE WHEN status = 'DRAFT' AND (to_unixtime(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) - to_unixtime(reported_at))/3600 > 72 THEN id END) AS number_overdue FROM (SELECT *, time_diff_mins/60 AS time_diff_hrs FROM (SELECT r.id, r.location, r.type, r.status, r.reported_at, cr.correction_requested_at, cr.user_action, CASE WHEN (correction_requested_at IS NOT NULL) THEN ROUND((to_unixtime(cr.correction_requested_at) - to_unixtime(r.reported_at))/60, 1) ELSE NULL END AS time_diff_mins FROM prisons.incidentreporting_report AS r LEFT JOIN (SELECT report_id, correction_requested_at, user_action FROM prisons.incidentreporting_correction_request WHERE sequence = 0 AND user_action IN ('REQUEST_REVIEW', 'REQUEST_NOT_REPORTABLE', 'REQUEST_DUPLICATE') AND user_type = 'REPORTING_OFFICER') AS cr ON r.id = cr.report_id WHERE location NOT IN ('NORTH', 'SOUTH') AND source = 'DPS')) GROUP BY 1, ROLLUP(location)

dataset.name: Feedback durations / month
dataset.query: SELECT dwlp.month, dw.min_date, dw.max_date, dwlp.location, dw.number_of_dw_responses, dw.dw_resp_time_days, ro.number_of_ro_responses, ro.ro_resp_time_days, dwlp.number_of_loops, dwlp.feedback_loop_days FROM (SELECT CAST(date_trunc('month', r.created_at) AS DATE) AS month, COALESCE(r.location, 'All locations') AS location, COUNT(stats.time_since_last) AS number_of_loops, ROUND(AVG(stats.time_since_last)/24, 1) AS feedback_loop_days FROM prisons.incidentreporting_report AS r LEFT JOIN (SELECT cr.report_id, diff.time_since_last FROM prisons.incidentreporting_correction_request AS cr LEFT JOIN (SELECT report_id, sequence, time_since_last FROM (SELECT *, sequence - lag(sequence) OVER (PARTITION BY report_id ORDER BY sequence) AS seq_diff, ROUND((to_unixtime(correction_requested_at) - to_unixtime(lag(correction_requested_at) OVER (PARTITION BY report_id ORDER BY sequence)))/3600, 1) AS time_since_last FROM (SELECT cr.report_id, sequence, correction_requested_at FROM prisons.incidentreporting_correction_request AS cr LEFT JOIN (SELECT report_id, CASE WHEN count(id) > 1 THEN 1 ElSE NULL END AS marker FROM prisons.incidentreporting_correction_request WHERE user_type = 'DATA_WARDEN' GROUP BY report_id) AS mk ON cr.report_id = mk.report_id WHERE mk.marker IS NOT NULL AND user_type = 'DATA_WARDEN'))) WHERE seq_diff > 1) AS diff ON cr.report_id = diff.report_id AND cr.sequence = diff.sequence WHERE diff.time_since_last IS NOT NULL) AS stats ON r.id = stats.report_id WHERE r.source = 'DPS' AND r.location NOT IN ('NORTH', 'SOUTH') GROUP BY 1, ROLLUP(r.location)) AS dwlp JOIN (SELECT CAST(date_trunc('month', r.created_at) AS DATE) AS month, COALESCE(r.location, 'All locations') AS location, COUNT(stats.time_since_last) AS number_of_ro_responses, ROUND(AVG(stats.time_since_last)/24, 1) AS ro_resp_time_days FROM prisons.incidentreporting_report AS r LEFT JOIN (SELECT report_id, time_since_last FROM (SELECT *, ROUND((to_unixtime(correction_requested_at) - to_unixtime(lag(correction_requested_at) OVER (PARTITION BY report_id ORDER BY sequence)))/3600, 1) AS time_since_last, lag(user_type) OVER (PARTITION BY report_id ORDER BY sequence) AS last_user_type FROM prisons.incidentreporting_correction_request) WHERE user_type <> last_user_type AND user_type = 'REPORTING_OFFICER') AS stats ON r.id = stats.report_id WHERE r.source = 'DPS' AND r.location NOT IN ('NORTH', 'SOUTH') GROUP BY 1, ROLLUP(r.location)) AS ro ON dwlp.month = ro.month AND dwlp.location = ro.location JOIN (SELECT CAST(date_trunc('month', r.created_at) AS DATE) AS month, format_datetime(MIN(r.created_at), 'dd/MM/yyyy') AS min_date, format_datetime(MAX(r.created_at), 'dd/MM/yyyy') AS max_date, COALESCE(r.location, 'All locations') AS location, COUNT(stats.time_since_last) AS number_of_dw_responses, ROUND(AVG(stats.time_since_last)/24, 1) AS dw_resp_time_days FROM prisons.incidentreporting_report AS r LEFT JOIN (SELECT report_id, time_since_last FROM (SELECT *, ROUND((to_unixtime(correction_requested_at) - to_unixtime(lag(correction_requested_at) OVER (PARTITION BY report_id ORDER BY sequence)))/3600, 1) AS time_since_last, lag(user_type) OVER (PARTITION BY report_id ORDER BY sequence) AS last_user_type FROM prisons.incidentreporting_correction_request) WHERE user_type <> last_user_type AND user_type = 'DATA_WARDEN') AS stats ON r.id = stats.report_id WHERE r.source = 'DPS' AND r.location NOT IN ('NORTH', 'SOUTH') GROUP BY 1, ROLLUP(r.location) ) AS dw ON dwlp.month = dw.month AND dwlp.location = dw.location

dataset.name: Incidents reopened / week
dataset.query: SELECT CAST(date_trunc('week', sh.changed_at) AS DATE) AS week, format_datetime(MIN(sh.changed_at), 'dd/MM/yyyy') AS min_date, format_datetime(MAX(sh.changed_at), 'dd/MM/yyyy') AS max_date, COALESCE(r.location, 'All locations') AS location, COALESCE(ct.description, 'All incident types') AS incident_type, count(sh.report_id) AS reopened_count FROM prisons.incidentreporting_status_history AS sh LEFT JOIN (SELECT location, type, id FROM prisons.incidentreporting_report) AS r ON sh.report_id = r.id LEFT JOIN (SELECT code, description FROM prisons.incidentreporting_constant_type) AS ct ON r.type = ct.code WHERE status = 'REOPENED' GROUP BY 1, ROLLUP(r.location), ROLLUP(ct.description)

dataset.name: Incidents reopened / month
dataset.query: SELECT CAST(date_trunc('month', sh.changed_at) AS DATE) AS month, format_datetime(MIN(sh.changed_at), 'dd/MM/yyyy') AS min_date, format_datetime(MAX(sh.changed_at), 'dd/MM/yyyy') AS max_date, COALESCE(r.location, 'All locations') AS location, COALESCE(ct.description, 'All incident types') AS incident_type, count(sh.report_id) AS reopened_count FROM prisons.incidentreporting_status_history AS sh LEFT JOIN (SELECT location, type, id FROM prisons.incidentreporting_report) AS r ON sh.report_id = r.id LEFT JOIN (SELECT code, description FROM prisons.incidentreporting_constant_type) AS ct ON r.type = ct.code WHERE status = 'REOPENED' GROUP BY 1, ROLLUP(r.location), ROLLUP(ct.description)

dataset.name: Locations
dataset.query: SELECT DISTINCT(location) AS location FROM prisons.incidentreporting_report WHERE source = 'DPS' AND location NOT IN ('NORTH', 'SOUTH') UNION ALL SELECT 'All locations' AS location

dataset.name: Incident Types
dataset.query: SELECT DISTINCT(description) FROM prisons.incidentreporting_constant_type_family UNION ALL SELECT 'All incident types' AS description

dataset.name: Data wardens
dataset.query: SELECT DISTINCT(correction_requested_by) AS dw_username FROM prisons.incidentreporting_correction_request WHERE user_type = 'DATA_WARDEN' UNION ALL SELECT 'All data wardens' AS dw_username

report.name: DW actions / day
report.description: Counts of incident report actions conducted by data wardens per day.

report.name: DW actions / month
report.description: Counts of incident report actions conducted by data wardens per month.

report.name: % of reports returned / month
report.description: % of incident reports returned to reporting officers by data wardens categorised by when the report was created.

field.name: $ref:dw_not_seen
field.display: Reports not yet   seen by a DW

report.name: % of reviews returned / month
report.description: % of first line checker reviews that have sent reports back to reporting officers categorised by when the review was conducted.

report.name: Report actions / week
report.description: Counts of all user actions on reports per week.

report.name: Report actions / month
report.description: Counts of all user actions on reports per month.

report.name: RO submission statistics / month
report.description: Statistics focusing on time taken for reporting officers to submit reports per month.

field.display: Number of reports  submitted after 72 hrs

field.display: Percentage of  reports submitted after 72 hrs

field.name: $ref:avg_mins_wo_too_long
field.display: Average time to submit  within 72 hrs (mins)

report.description: Average durations for reporting officers and data wardens to respond to report submissions.

field.display: Number of  DW responses to  RO submission

field.name: $ref:number_of_ro_responses
field.display: Number of  RO responses to  DW returns

field.name: $ref:ro_resp_time_days
field.display: Average time for  RO to respond to  DW submission (days)

field.name: $ref:feedback_loop_days
field.display: Average time for  another DW action after  returning report to RO (days)

report.name: Incidents reopened / week
report.description: Count of incident reports re-opened per week
